statement: In every magma, Equation 1170 (`x = y * ((z * (y * y)) * w)`) implies Equation 275 (`x = ((y * x) * y) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0665
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z (op y y)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y x) y) z)
